meaning: n.(=coachman)马车夫,人造绳(垂钓用的鱼饵)
examples: You will end up taking things out on your coachee and that is counter productive and unfair.
When providing coaching, explain what the process is, how long it will take, and what will be covered. Encourage the coachee to journal their progress.
The coach and coachee define a 'contract' based on the needs and expectations of the coachee, and identify links to be made to the organization's Performance Review.
